title: plectranthus chevalieri
intro: Plectranthus chevalieri, also known as Mountain Scent, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus chevalieri include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
